name: Nike Retail Brand Marketing
summary: Led retail marketing and store design programs for Nike North America, managing $10M+ in annual budgets across in-store signage, digital displays, and specialty store builds up to 6,000 square feet.
problem: Nike needed consistent, on-brand retail experiences executed at scale across North America, spanning everything from in-store digital components to full specialty store builds, on tight timelines and under significant budget scrutiny.
whatIDid: Owned end-to-end project execution across six years of retail marketing and store design programs. Managed $10M+ in annual budgets, directed site surveys, defined project scope, and led communication across designers, retail accounts, agencies, vendors, and construction teams. Delivered store builds ranging from 900 to 6,000+ square feet.
outcome: Consistent, on-time, on-budget retail program delivery across hundreds of locations. Established vendor relationships and communication systems that supported North America's retail brand growth throughout a defining period for Nike's physical retail presence.

name: Apple Retail Experience
summary: Produced shop-in-shop, digital, print, and retail space presentations for Apple's key retail partners across North America. End-to-end, from creative inception through physical installation.
problem: Apple's retail partner program required high-stakes, brand-perfect installations across multiple retail environments simultaneously, with no margin for error on timeline, quality, or brand standards.
whatIDid: Led the full creative and production process for shop-in-shop displays, digital components, print marketing, and retail space presentations. Managed cross-functional teams including project managers, surveyors, field operations, and construction crews. Drove product and marketing program approvals with key retail partners and orchestrated multiple vendor relationships to ensure seamless execution.
outcome: On-time, on-budget delivery of retail experiences meeting Apple's exacting brand standards across North America retail partner locations.

name: LaunchKit
summary: A productized launch system for solo founders, combining strategy, design, development, and launch tools to help ideas go live faster.
problem: Solo founders and small business owners consistently stall between having an idea and getting it live, overwhelmed by the number of decisions, tools, and steps involved in launching a digital product or website.
whatIDid: Designed and built LaunchKit as a productized system: Canva templates, brand kits, and digital tools structured to move founders from concept to launch without getting stuck. Handled product design, distribution setup, and the full launch strategy.
outcome: A growing catalog of digital products sold via Etsy and Shopify, built on a repeatable system that scales without custom client work.

name: Aloha Animal Outreach
summary: Website redesign and digital strategy for an Oahu-based animal rescue, supporting outreach, trust-building, and community engagement across the island.
problem: AAO needed a web presence that could support donor trust, community outreach, and volunteer engagement, without the budget of a commercial client and with a small team managing everything.
whatIDid: Redesigned the website with a donation-first structure, rewrote homepage copy for conversion, and built a digital strategy focused on community engagement and trust signals. Provided ongoing web and tech support in an advisory capacity.
outcome: A clearer, more conversion-focused web presence that better supports AAO's outreach mission across Oahu's unhoused communities.

name: Freelance Web & App Development
summary: Custom websites and web applications built for small businesses, startups, and solo founders. From brand sites to functional digital products.
problem: Small businesses and founders often struggle to get a professional, performant web presence without enterprise budgets, ending up with bloated templates or generic solutions that don't reflect their brand.
whatIDid: Designed and developed custom websites and web applications tailored to each client's goals, handling everything from information architecture and UI design to front-end development and deployment. Built with modern frameworks prioritizing speed, accessibility, and clean design.
outcome: A growing portfolio of client sites and apps, each shipped on time, built to perform, and designed to grow with the business.
